dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROAN

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Ugh... My head feels like it's been repeatedly smashed by a hammer. What in the world did I drink last night?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kim Rok Soo, a man who had lived a perfectly average, if somewhat cynical, life as a team leader in a dangerous ability-user organization, slowly opened his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Wait. This isn't my apartment. This isn't even my body.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (memory recall)

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Red hair. A face I recognize… No way. This is… Cale Henituse. The trash of the Count's family from 'The Birth of a Hero'?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Memories flooded his mind – not just his own, but Cale Henituse's. The novel he had just finished reading before falling asleep. The protagonist, Choi Han. The villain, the White Star. And Cale, the minor character destined to be beaten to a pulp by Choi Han.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: This is ridiculous. I just wanted to live a quiet life, retire early, and read books. Not transmigrate into a novel, let alone as *this* guy! The guy who gets brutalized by the protagonist!

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: If I remember correctly, Choi Han arrives in Harris Village in about six months. And then, the village gets destroyed, and Cale provokes him and gets half-killed.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: No. Absolutely not. I refuse to be a punching bag. I refuse to get involved in any of that hero nonsense. My goal is a peaceful, lazy life. A life where I don't have to risk my neck every five minutes.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He scanned the opulent room, a stark contrast to his old, modest apartment. Wine bottles lay scattered, evidence of Cale's infamous 'trashy' lifestyle.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Alright, Kim Rok Soo. Think. How do you avoid getting caught up in the plot? How do you live a comfortable, trashy, but safe life?

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: The answer is simple. If I'm already known as trash, I'll just lean into it. No one expects anything from trash. No one asks trash to be a hero. Trash just... exists.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK (door opening)

dialogue.speaker: Ron Molan
dialogue.line: Young Master, you are finally awake.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A man with a benign smile, yet eyes that held a chilling glint, entered the room. Ron, the butler. And, as Kim Rok Soo knew, a terrifying assassin.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Ugh, old man. You're too loud. My head is throbbing.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: He's even scarier in person. Keep up the act, Kim Rok Soo. Don't let him see through you.

dialogue.speaker: Ron Molan
dialogue.line: My apologies, Young Master. Would you like some refreshing lemon tea? Or perhaps, something stronger to soothe your hangover?

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Lemon tea? Are you trying to kill me, old man? Bring me a bottle of the finest wine. And make it quick! I need to drown this headache.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Perfect. Act like a spoiled, demanding brat. That's Cale. That's my ticket to a peaceful life.

dialogue.speaker: Ron Molan
dialogue.line: As you wish, Young Master. I shall be right back.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Ron's smile widened, a smile that didn't quite reach his eyes, before he turned and exited the room.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK (door closing)

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Step one: Survive. Step two: Get rich. Step three: Live a life of leisure. This Cale Henituse persona… it's my shield. My path to freedom.

dialogue.speaker: Cale Henituse
dialogue.line: Let the hero save the world. I'll just be over here, being trash, and enjoying my retirement.

summary: Kim Rok Soo wakes up as Cale Henituse, the infamous 'trash' from the novel 'The Birth of a Hero'. Realizing his perilous future, he decides to lean into Cale's trashy persona to avoid the plot and live a peaceful, lazy life, starting with a demanding interaction with the terrifying butler, Ron.
